summary: Excellent new-era performance featuring Bruce Hornsby's debut and the final Gimme Some Lovin', though recording source is unspecified
review: Reviewers rave about this show as a historic moment – it marks Bruce Hornsby’s first appearance with the Dead and includes the last-ever rendition of "Gimme Some Lovin'" (the only one without Brent). While no details are given about the audio source, the five‑star rating implies listeners found the recording enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review, but it gives a perfect 5‑star rating and highlights unique musical moments; lack of technical detail keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or pacing was given.
